epsilon_cutoff.info: Energy cutoff for the dielectric matrix in Ry.

number_bands.info: Total number of bands (valence+conduction) to sum over.

number_core_excluded.info: Number of core states to exclude.

init_frequency.info: Lower bound for linear frequency grid (eV).

frequency_low_cutoff.info: Upper bound for linear grid / lower bound for non-uniform grid (eV).

frequency_high_cutoff.info: Upper limit of non-uniform frequency grid (eV).

delta_frequency_step.info: Increase in frequency step for non-uniform grid (eV).

number_imaginary_freqs.info: Number of frequencies on imaginary axis (contour deformation).

add_w0_freq.info: Add zero frequency as first grid value.

init_sfrequency.info: Lower bound for spectral function linear grid (eV). Method 1 only.

delta_sfrequency.info: Frequency step for spectral function linear grid (eV). Method 1 only.

sfrequency_low_cutoff.info: Upper bound for spectral function linear grid (eV). Method 1 only.

sfrequency_high_cutoff.info: Upper limit for spectral function non-uniform grid (eV). Method 1 only.

delta_sfrequency_step.info: Increase in freq step for spectral function non-uniform grid. Method 1 only.

use_wfn_hdf5.info: Read WFN in HDF5 format (WFN.h5, WFNq.h5).

dont_use_hdf5.info: Use binary format for epsmat instead of HDF5.

write_vcoul.info: Write bare Coulomb potential v(q+G) to file.

restart.info: Restart from last fully calculated q-point (HDF5 only).

skip_epsilon.info: Compute polarizability only (write chimat), skip epsilon.

skip_chi.info: Read polarizability from chimat, construct and invert epsilon.

read_chi_maxmem_per_block.info: Max memory (MB) per MPI task for reading chimat blocks.

stop_after_qpt.info: Stop after specified number of q-points (-1=all).

subsample.info: Allow multiple q->0 points for subsampled sigma.

do_rpa.info: Enable RPA energy calculation. Must appear BEFORE begin qpoints.

fermi_level_relative.info: Treat fermi_level as relative to mean-field Fermi (default).

occ_broadening.info: Broadening for partial band occupations (Methfessel-Paxton). Requires fermi_level_absolute.

partial_occ_degeneracy_tolerance.info: Tolerance for degeneracy check in partially occupied bands.

RPA_insulator.info: Treat system as insulator in RPA energy calculation.

cvfit.info: Scissors operator: evs ev0 evdel ecs ec0 ecdel (6 values, eV).

eqp_corrections.info: Use eigenvalues from eqp.dat and eqp_q.dat instead of scissors.

spherical_truncation.info: Use spherical truncation for Coulomb potential.

sub_collective_eigen_redistr.info: Use collective operations for eigenvector redistribution.

number_valence_pools.info: Number of pools for valence band distribution.

nfreq_group.info: Number of frequency groups for parallel frequency calculation.

nv_block.info: Valence band block size for memory-limited runs.

max_mem_nv_block_algo.info: Max memory (GB) per MPI task for valence band blocking.

n_ffts_per_batch.info: Number of FFTs per batch in mtxel kernel.

chi_eigenvalue_cutoff.info: Screening threshold for eigenvalues of static polarizability.

cluster_size_subspace_diagonalization.info: Cluster size for ScaLAPACK diag in subspace method.

subspace_dont_keep_full_eps_omega0.info: Disable full static epsilon output in epsmat files.

accel_mtxel_band_block_size.info: Inner block size for band mtxel GPU kernel.

accel_chi_summation_no_full_offload.info: Avoid fully offloading gme matrix to GPU.

mtxel_algo.info: GPU mtxel algorithm: CPU_ALGO, OPENACC_ALGO, OMP_TARGET_ALGO.

chi_summation_algo.info: GPU chi_summation algorithm: CPU_ALGO, OPENACC_ALGO, OMP_TARGET_ALGO.

fullbz_replace.info: Replace unfolded BZ with full BZ (experimental).

fullbz_write.info: Write unfolded and full BZ to files (experimental).

no_min_fftgrid.info: Disable automatic smallest FFT grid determination.
